name: bp-tracker
description: Open-source multi-clan Pirate Galaxy blueprint tracker.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @bp-tracker/contracts && concurrently "npm run dev -w @bp-tracker/api" "npm run dev -w @bp-tracker/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bp-tracker/contracts && npm run build -w @bp-tracker/api && npm run build -w @bp-tracker/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @bp-tracker/contracts && npm run build -w @bp-tracker/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @bp-tracker/api && npm run typecheck -w @bp-tracker/web && npm run typecheck:scripts
scripts.test: npm run test -w @bp-tracker/contracts && npm run test -w @bp-tracker/api && npm run test -w @bp-tracker/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @bp-tracker/contracts && npm run test:coverage -w @bp-tracker/api && npm run test:coverage -w @bp-tracker/web
